negativeEvidence.strongNegativeEvidence: Explicit verbatim: 'International students are not eligible to apply for rotations at TUSM.' Also 'TUSM does not offer observerships for visiting students.'
negativeEvidence.weakNegativeEvidence: Tufts Medical Center hospital not separately named on hub page; placement is via 'TUSM-affiliated hospitals' which implicitly includes Tufts MC.

nextAction: For public-safe activation: (a) SCHOOL_LEVEL_SOURCE — TUSM hub; (b) US LCME final-year only; (c) international students EXPLICITLY EXCLUDED verbatim; (d) observerships NOT offered for visiting students verbatim; (e) max 12 weeks (3 × 4-week); (f) VSLO required; (g) cost/visa NOT_STATED.
plainEnglishSummary: Tufts Medical Center accepts visiting medical students only through Tufts University School of Medicine's away-rotations program. Final-year LCME-accredited medical students only — international students are explicitly excluded. Observerships are explicitly not offered. Max 12 weeks across three 4-week rotations. VSLO required. Cost and visa policies not stated on the hub.
driftCheck: This advanced national USCE discovery because MA gained a fourth P101 packet with the explicit verbatim 'international students not eligible' and 'observerships not offered' exclusions captured — both protect against future overclaim on Tufts.
